about.checkUpdatesUnavailable: Update checking is not connected yet

actions.description: Control which quick actions appear on history rows.
actions.title: Quick Actions

appearance.description: Configure theme, language, and list density.
appearance.title: Appearance & Language

backup.description: Future migration for the history database and resource files.
backup.title: Backup & Migration

capture.description: Choose which clipboard types are saved to history.
capture.title: Content Types

control.description: Control startup behavior and system entry points for EcoPaste.
control.title: System Entry

copy.description: Configure copy format and feedback when reusing history.
copy.title: Copy Feedback

diagnostics.description: Reset window state or restore preference defaults.
diagnostics.title: Diagnostics

external.description: Future read-only access for external tools.
external.title: External Tools

globalShortcuts.description: Configure system shortcuts that work from any app.
globalShortcuts.title: Global Shortcuts

history.description: Set retention time and item-count limits for history.
history.title: Retention & Cleanup

localData.description: Open where EcoPaste stores local data, resources, and logs.
localData.title: Storage Locations

organizing.description: Configure favorites, notes, and grouping behavior.
organizing.title: Favorites & Notes

paste.description: Configure copy, paste, and format behavior when clicking history records.
paste.title: Paste Behavior

preview.description: Configure how full history records are previewed.
preview.title: Content Preview

search.description: Configure search habits in the main window.
search.title: Search & Sort

sensitive.description: Avoid saving keys, tokens, and other sensitive content by mistake.
sensitive.title: Privacy

source.description: Control which source apps can save copied content to history.
source.title: App Filters

updates.description: Configure how EcoPaste checks for and receives new versions.
updates.title: Updates

window.description: Set where the clipboard main window opens each time.
window.title: Main Window

deleteConfirm.description: Ask for confirmation before deleting a history record to prevent mistakes.
deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Before Delete

visible.description: Choose which action buttons appear when hovering over a record.
visible.title: Visible Quick Actions

fileMaxCount.description: Limit how many files are shown in each file record card.
fileMaxCount.title: Maximum Files Shown

imageMaxHeight.description: Limit thumbnail height for image records in the list.
imageMaxHeight.title: Maximum Image Height

reducedMotion.description: Follow the system reduced-motion preference to reduce animation intensity.
reducedMotion.title: Reduce Motion

textMaxLines.description: Limit how many lines are shown in each text record card.
textMaxLines.title: Maximum Text Lines

theme.description: Use light mode, dark mode, or follow the system appearance.
theme.title: Theme

exportHistory.description: Future export for the history database and resource files.
exportHistory.title: Export History

importHistory.description: Future restore from a history database and resource backup.
importHistory.title: Import History

files.description: When off, copied files and folders are not saved to history.
files.title: Files and Folders

html.description: When off, rich text with HTML format is not saved to history.
html.title: HTML Content

image.description: When off, clipboard images are not saved to history.
image.title: Image

rtf.description: When off, rich text with RTF format is not saved to history.
rtf.title: RTF Content

text.description: When off, copied plain text is not saved to history.
text.title: Plain Text

autoStart.description: Start EcoPaste automatically after logging in.
autoStart.title: Launch at Login

dockIcon.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system desktop bar.

macos.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the Dock.
macos.title: Dock Icon

dockIcon.title: Desktop Bar Icon

windows.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the taskbar.
windows.title: Taskbar Icon

silentStart.description: When launched at login, run in the background without opening the clipboard window.
silentStart.title: Silent Start

trayIcon.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system status area.

macos.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the menu bar.
macos.title: Menu Bar Icon

trayIcon.title: Status Area Icon

windows.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system tray.
windows.title: System Tray Icon

plainDefault.description: When copying text records, strip HTML/RTF formatting and copy plain text by default.
plainDefault.title: Copy as Plain Text by Default

sound.description: Play a sound when new clipboard content is saved to history.
sound.title: Copy Sound

updateOnReuse.description: Refresh use time and usage count when copying or pasting a history record.
updateOnReuse.title: Update Record on Reuse

resetPreferences.confirmContent: This restores every preference to its default value, but keeps clipboard history records.
resetPreferences.description: Restore all preference defaults while keeping history records.
resetPreferences.title: Reset All Preferences

resetWindow.description: Future reset for saved window positions and sizes.
resetWindow.title: Reset Window Position

ai.description: Future access for AI tools to search local clipboard history.
ai.title: AI Tool Access

cli.description: Future command-line access to query local clipboard history.
cli.title: CLI Access

mcp.description: Future read-only history query tools for MCP clients.
mcp.title: MCP Server

keepFavorite.description: Favorite records are not affected by retention period or item-count limits.
keepFavorite.title: Keep Favorites During Cleanup

keepPinned.description: Pinned records are not affected by retention period or item-count limits.
keepPinned.title: Keep Pinned During Cleanup

maxCount.description: When the limit is exceeded, older regular records are cleaned automatically.
maxCount.title: Maximum Items

maxSize.description: Future option to skip clipboard content above the size limit.
maxSize.title: Maximum Item Size

retention.description: Regular records older than this period are cleaned automatically.
retention.title: Retention Period

cleanCache.description: Future cleanup for resource files no longer referenced by history.
cleanCache.title: Clean Cache

dataDirectory.description: Open the directory containing the history database, settings, and resource cache.
dataDirectory.title: Data Directory

logDirectory.description: Open the runtime log directory used for troubleshooting.
logDirectory.title: Log Directory

autoFavorite.description: When saving a non-empty note, automatically add that record to favorites.
autoFavorite.title: Auto-Favorite When Noted

customGroups.description: Future custom groups for organizing history records by topic.
customGroups.title: Custom Groups

autoPaste.description: Choose what happens when left-clicking a history record.
autoPaste.title: Left Click

fileMode.description: When pasting file records, paste file paths by default instead of the files themselves.
fileMode.title: Paste File Paths by Default

middleClick.description: Choose what happens when middle-clicking a history record.
middleClick.title: Middle Click

plainDefault.description: When pasting text records, strip HTML/RTF formatting and paste plain text by default.
plainDefault.title: Paste as Plain Text by Default

delay.description: Set how long to hover before the preview appears.
delay.title: Hover Delay

hover.description: Show a full-content preview when hovering over a record.
hover.title: Hover Preview

space.description: Hold Space to preview the currently selected record.
space.title: Space Preview

clearOnHide.description: Clear the search keyword and show the full list next time the clipboard window opens.
clearOnHide.title: Clear Search on Next Open

defaultFocus.description: Select the search box when the clipboard window opens so you can type keywords right away.
defaultFocus.title: Focus Search on Window Open

sort.description: Choose the default order for history records when no search is active.
sort.title: Default Sort Order

keywordRules.description: Skip matching content by keyword or rule.
keywordRules.title: Content Ignore Rules

secretDetection.description: Skip saving content that looks like high-confidence keys, tokens, or similar secrets.
secretDetection.title: Detect Secrets and Tokens

openClipboard.description: Open or hide the clipboard main window from any app.
openClipboard.title: Open Main Window

openPreference.description: Open or hide the preferences window from any app.
openPreference.title: Open Preferences

excludedApps.description: Content copied from these apps will not be saved to history.
excludedApps.title: Ignored Apps

scanDirs.description: Add app scan directories for detecting source app names and icons.
scanDirs.title: App Discovery Directories

autoCheck.description: Periodically check whether a new EcoPaste version is available.
autoCheck.title: Automatically Check for Updates

beta.description: Receive beta test versions when checking for updates.
beta.title: Include Beta Versions

frequency.description: Future option for how often EcoPaste checks for updates.
frequency.title: Update Check Frequency

position.description: Choose where the clipboard main window opens each time.
position.title: Open Position
